news.t: WisdomTree Office Hours: Unlocking Value in Laddered Munis
WisdomTree Launches Core Laddered and High Income Laddered Municipal ETFs

overview.description: The WisdomTree High Income Laddered Municipal Fund (WTMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund aims to provide federal tax-exempt current income through an actively managed portfolio of US municipal bonds with varying credit ratings. The fund seeks to maintain an average portfolio duration between five and ten years. WTMY was launched on Apr 3, 2025 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: WisdomTree Office Hours: Unlocking Value in Laddered Munis
data.text: Geopolitical tensions, higher-for-longer interest rates, and a new Fed chair forthcoming. It seems like fixed income investors have plenty to worry about, but thankfully, they also have optionality wh...

data.title: WisdomTree Launches Core Laddered and High Income Laddered Municipal ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WisdomTree announces the launch of the WisdomTree Core Laddered Municipal Fund (WTMU) and WisdomTree High Income Laddered Municipal Fund (WTMY).
